title: Modern Whore
overview: A hybrid documentary that reimagines popular depictions of sex work through the lived experiences of writer, performer, and sex worker Andrea Werhun. Andrea grapples with social stigma and reclaims her narrative in a series of funny, heartbreaking, and surprising stories.

trailers.title: Nicole Bazuin reduces shame and stigma with Modern Whore
